title: Conditions satisfaction at filing dates
text: Unless otherwise provided in this Chapter, an issuer making an initial public offer of specified securities shall satisfy the conditions of this Chapter as on the date of filing of the draft offer document with the Board and also as on the date of 25[filing] the offer document with the Registrar of

source.span_hint: Unless otherwise provided in this Chapter

title: (a) Debarment condition
text: if the issuer, any of its promoters, promoter group or directors or selling shareholders are debarred from accessing the capital market by the Board.

source.span_hint: issuer any of its promoters promoter group or directors

title: (b) Debarred Promoter/Director Condition
text: if any of the promoters or directors of the issuer is a promoter or director of any other company which is debarred from accessing the capital market by the Board.

source.span_hint: if any of the promoters or directors

title: (c) wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower condition
text: if the issuer or any of its promoters or directors is a 26[wilful defaulter or a fraudulent borrower].

source.span_hint: issuer or any of its promoters or directors is a

title: (d) Fugitive Economic Offender Condition
text: if any of its promoters or directors is a fugitive economic offender.

source.span_hint: if any of its promoters or directors is a fugitive economic offender

title: Debarred persons exemption
text: The restrictions under (a) and (b) above shall not apply to the persons or entities mentioned therein, who were debarred in the past by the Board and the period of debarment is already over as on the date of filing of the draft offer document with the Board.

source.span_hint: The restrictions under a and b above shall not apply

title: Ineligibility for IPO due to outstanding convertible securities or rights
text: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer if there are any outstanding convertible securities or any other right which would entitle any person with any option to receive equity shares of the issuer:

source.span_hint: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer

title: (1)(a) Net Tangible Assets Requirement
text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets:

maps_to.constraints_text: at least three crore rupees, not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets

source.span_hint: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore

title: Net tangible asset utilization
text: if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess monetary assets in its business or project;

source.span_hint: if more than fifty per cent of the net tangible assets

title: Limit of fifty per cent on monetary assets exception for OFS
text: the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable in case the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.

source.span_hint: the limit of fifty per cent on monetary assets

title: (b) Average Operating Profit Requirement
text: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years;

source.span_hint: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees

title: (c) Net Worth Condition
text: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis;

source.span_hint: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees

text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets:

source.span_hint: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore

text: Provided that if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess monetary assets in its business or project;

source.span_hint: if more than fifty per cent of the net tangible assets

title: Limit of fifty per cent on monetary assets exception
text: Provided further that the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable in case the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.

source.span_hint: limit of fifty per cent on monetary assets

title: Operating Profit Requirement
text: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years;

source.span_hint: it has an average operating profit of at least

title: Net worth condition for preceding three years
text: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis;

source.span_hint: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees

title: Revenue requirement if name changed recently
text: if it has changed its name within the last one year, at least fifty per cent. of the revenue, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, for the preceding one full year has been earned by it from the activity indicated by its new name.

source.span_hint: if it has changed its name within the last one year

title: Eligibility for IPO through book-building process
text: An issuer not satisfying the condition stipulated in sub-regulation (1) shall be eligible to make an initial public offer only if the issue is made through the book-building process and the issuer undertakes to allot at least seventy five per cent. of the net offer to qualified institutional buyers

maps_to.constraints_text: at least seventy five per cent

source.span_hint: An issuer not satisfying the condition stipulated in sub-regulation

title: Technology Intensive Requirement
text: the issuer shall be intensive in the use of technology, information technology, intellectual property, data analytics, bio-technology or nano-technology to provide products, services or business platforms with substantial value addition.

source.span_hint: the issuer shall be intensive

title: Net worth threshold for SR shareholders
text: the net worth of the SR shareholder, as determined by a Registered Valuer, shall not be more than rupees one thousand crore.

source.span_hint: the net worth of the SR shareholder

title: SR shareholder net worth calculation
text: While determining the individual net worth of the SR shareholder, his investment/ shareholding in other listed companies shall be considered but not that of his shareholding in the issuer company.
